pack.name: fabric-profile-market
pack.description: Installable behavioral profiles for Fabric, organized into fan-inspired, public-domain, and original themed collections.
pack.author: Fabric Profile Market contributors
pack.rights_notice: The licenses covering this collection's code and original prose do not grant rights in third-party names or fictional properties. Those remain the property of their respective rights holders. No affiliation, sponsorship, or endorsement is claimed.

categories.description: Unofficial behavioral adaptations of DC characters, focused on distinct working methods rather than impersonation or roleplay.
categories.rights_notice: Unofficial fan-made profiles. DC and its character names are properties of their respective rights holders. No logos, artwork, dialogue, story text, or claims of affiliation are included.

categories.description: Unofficial behavioral adaptations of Marvel characters, translated into practical collaboration, research, and problem-solving styles.
categories.rights_notice: Unofficial fan-made profiles. Marvel and its character names are properties of their respective rights holders. No logos, artwork, dialogue, story text, or claims of affiliation are included.

categories.description: Public-domain mythic archetypes recast as strategists, builders, messengers, scouts, arbiters, and journey planners.
categories.rights_notice: Based on ancient mythic material in the public domain. All profile prose, organization, and visual styling in this collection are original.

categories.description: Public-domain Arthurian roles adapted for facilitation, foresight, diplomacy, execution, research, and constructive dissent.
categories.rights_notice: Based on public-domain Arthurian traditions. No text or visual material from modern adaptations is used; all profile prose and styling are original.

categories.description: Public-domain Holmes-era investigative profiles for hypotheses, observation, chronology, sources, ciphers, and argument synthesis.
categories.rights_notice: Inspired only by public-domain Sherlock Holmes material and general Victorian investigative traditions. Later adaptations, likenesses, dialogue, and visual designs are excluded.

categories.description: Public-domain Gothic archetypes applied to responsible innovation, coercion analysis, integrity, reputation, history, and incident response.
categories.rights_notice: Based on public-domain Gothic literature. Modern film imagery, character designs, dialogue, and adaptation-specific material are not used.

categories.description: Original space-expedition specialists for command, science, engineering, care, security, and first-contact communication.
categories.rights_notice: This category and its profiles are original genre archetypes. They are not based on or affiliated with any specific science-fiction franchise.

categories.description: Original magical-academic archetypes mapped to architecture, debugging, research, security, experimentation, and delegation.
categories.rights_notice: This category and its profiles are original genre archetypes. They do not reproduce any specific fantasy setting, character, school, terminology, or visual identity.

categories.description: Original cyberpunk specialists for defensive security, integrations, intelligence, institutional audit, data stewardship, and care technology.
categories.rights_notice: This category and its profiles are original genre archetypes. No setting, character, terminology, artwork, or story material from a specific cyberpunk property is used.

categories.description: Original production roles for creative direction, story structure, visual systems, delivery, continuity, and audience evidence.
categories.rights_notice: This category and its profiles are original professional archetypes. Generated work must continue to respect third-party copyrights, trademarks, privacy, and publicity rights.
